title: State of the Feed — Week of June 8–14, 2026
content_html:
The aggregator completed 26 runs this week, fetching an average of 829 articles per run with an average yield of 37 quality articles. The news category dominated ingestion at 717 articles, followed by ai-tech at 70 articles and wellness at 64 articles. Remaining coverage included science (27 articles), local (25 articles), climate (23 articles), homelab (17 articles), and scifi (9 articles).

Two new feeds were added this week: Animikii News River and OpenMedia. Feed health monitoring identified 42 feeds with errors, including Wildfire Today, OpenMedia, Smart Home and Automation (Kagi), First Peoples Cultural Council (Kagi), and Gear Gadgets Repair (Kagi). No feed discovery report was generated for the week.
